cleanup.title: Fix Repository
cleanup.confirm:
This will:
• Kill any stuck git processes for this repository
• Remove .lock files from .git/

Continue?
cleanup.nothing: Everything looks clean — no lock files and no stuck processes found.
remote.label: Remote:
remote.add_to_agent: 🔑  Add SSH key to agent (enter passphrase once)
remote.auth_required: ⚠  Authorization required. Click the button below to retry in terminal.
stash.title: Save Stash
branch_dialog.name: Branch Name:
tag.title: Create Tag
tag.name: Tag Name:
tag.push_after: Push tag to remote after creating
tag.push_error_msg:
Tag was created locally but could not be pushed:
{error}
clone.title: Clone Repository
clone.name: Name:
clone.error.title: Clone Failed
dialog.language.title: Interface Language
dialog.language.label: Select language:
dialog.language.restart: The language change will take effect after restarting the application.
about.title: About OpenSourceTree
about.text:
OpenSourceTree
A SourceTree-inspired Git GUI built with PyQt6.

Version 0.1.0
bookmarks.title: Repositories
bookmarks.not_git.title: Not a Git Repository
bookmarks.not_git.text: '{path}' is not a valid git repository.
conflict.abort_confirm: This will abort the current operation and restore the previous state. Continue?
conflict.title: Resolve Conflict: {filename}
conflict.sections: {n} conflict section(s) — edit the file or choose an option below
conflict.no_markers: No conflict markers found — file looks resolved
conflict.hint: Edit the file to resolve conflicts manually, or choose Accept Ours / Accept Theirs to take one side entirely.
conflict.accept_ours_tip: Keep the HEAD (current branch) version entirely — git checkout --ours
conflict.accept_theirs_tip: Keep the incoming version entirely — git checkout --theirs
conflict.open_editor_tip: Open file in your default editor to edit conflict markers manually
conflict.mark_resolved_tip: Stage the file as resolved — git add (use after manual editing)
conflict.no_editor:
Could not open an editor. Edit the file manually:
{path}
conflict.merge_ready: ✓ All conflicts resolved — commit to complete the merge
lfs.title: LFS Manager
lfs.track_tooltip: Add a glob pattern to .gitattributes so new files matching it are stored in LFS
lfs.untrack_tooltip: Remove the selected pattern from .gitattributes (does not delete already-tracked objects)
lfs.untrack_select_hint: Select a pattern from the list above first.
lfs.pointer_tooltip: Only a pointer file is stored locally. Double-click to download the actual content.
lfs.tree_tooltip: Double-click a pointer-only file to download it.
lfs.download_all_tooltip: Run 'git lfs pull' — replace all local pointer files with their actual content
lfs.push_objs_tooltip: Run 'git lfs push --all' — upload LFS objects to the remote (no commit needed)
lfs.prune_tooltip: Run 'git lfs prune' — delete locally cached LFS objects that are no longer needed
lfs.not_enabled: Git LFS is not installed or not initialized in this repo.
remotes.title: Manage Remotes
remotes.hint: HTTPS remotes require a token on every push. Switch to SSH to avoid this.
remotes.switch_ssh_tip: Convert HTTPS URL to SSH format so git uses your SSH key instead of a token
remotes.add_empty: Please enter both a name and URL.
diff.placeholder: Select a file to view diff
main.placeholder:
Open a repository from the bookmarks panel,
or use File → Open / Clone to get started.
tag.delete.info:
Delete only the local copy, or also remove the tag from the remote?

If the tag is already published, deleting it locally will bring it back on the next sync.
tag.delete.success_remote: Tag {name} deleted locally and from remote
clone.error.local_path_as_url: URL looks like a local path. Please enter an SSH (git@...) or HTTPS URL.
clone.error.ssh_failed: Clone was not completed or was cancelled.
ssh.title: SSH Keys and Profiles
ssh.btn_generate_tip: Generate a new SSH key pair
ssh.strict_check_tip:
accept-new — accept new, reject changed
yes — always verify
no — do not verify (unsafe)
ssh.btn_add_to_agent_tip:
Load the selected profile's key into ssh-agent.
If the key is passphrase-protected — enter it once.
ssh.agent_hint:
ssh-agent stores the decrypted key in RAM.
Git uses it automatically — passphrase is only asked when adding.
ssh.confirm_remove.title: Delete Profile
ssh.copy_pubkey.title: Public Key
ssh.copy_pubkey.no_file: The .pub file was not found next to the private key.
ssh.key_not_created.title: Key Not Created
ssh.key_not_created.text: Key file not found after generation.
ssh.key_created.title: Key Created
ssh.key_created.text:
Key created: {path}

Public key:
{path}.pub

Add the .pub content to GitHub/GitLab:
GitHub → Settings → SSH and GPG keys → New SSH key
ssh.import.confirm.title: Import Keys
ssh.test.no_host: Specify a host to connect to.
ssh.agent.title: ssh-agent
ssh.agent.start_failed:
Could not start ssh-agent.
Try manually: eval $(ssh-agent)
ssh.agent.clear.title: Clear Agent
ssh.agent.clear.text:
Unload all keys from ssh-agent?
At the next git operation the passphrase will be requested again.
ssh.keygen.title: Generate SSH Key
ssh.keygen.passphrase_hint:
The passphrase protects the key on disk. With ssh-agent
you only need to enter it once per session.
ssh.keygen.error.no_path: Specify a path to save the key.
ssh.keygen.error.title: Error
accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.token_hint:
Create: GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens.
Permissions: repo (for read/write).
accounts.test_no_api: API URL not defined for this provider.
accounts.avatar_no_login: Enter a login to fetch avatar.
accounts.avatar_load_error: Could not load avatar (check login and token).
accounts.confirm_remove.title: Delete Account
identity.title: Git Identity — Name and E-mail
identity.hint: This data will appear as the author in your commits.
identity.error.empty: Name and e-mail cannot be empty.
identity.error.title: Git Identity
split_commit.title: Split Commit
split_commit.subtitle:
{sha}  "{message}"
Total: {size} → {n} commit(s)
split_commit.large_file_warn: ⚠ {path} ({size}) exceeds 100 MB — GitHub will reject this file. Consider Git LFS.
split_commit.no_upstream: Could not determine unpushed commits (no upstream configured)
commit.warn_large.title: Large staged files
commit.warn_large.total_text:
Total staged size is {size}, which exceeds 1 GB. GitHub may reject this push.

Consider splitting. Commit anyway?
branch_dialog.merge_hint: The selected branch will be merged into the current branch.
branch_dialog.rebase_hint: The current branch will be rebased onto the selected branch.
branch_dialog.conflict.merge_text:
Merge conflicts occurred.

Git has written the conflicting files to disk.
Resolve them in the Working Copy panel:
  • Right-click a conflicted file → Resolve Conflict
  • Or choose Accept Ours / Accept Theirs

After resolving all conflicts, create a commit to finish the merge.
branch_dialog.conflict.rebase_text:
Conflicts occurred during rebase.

Resolve the conflicts in the Working Copy panel,
then click Continue Rebase in the conflict banner,
or use Abort Rebase to cancel.
conflict.rebase_ready: ✓ All conflicts resolved — click Continue Rebase to proceed
conflict.cherry_pick_ready: ✓ All conflicts resolved — click Continue Cherry-pick to proceed
hard_reset.dialog_text:
Reset branch to commit {hash} in HARD mode?

All uncommitted changes will be AUTOMATICALLY SAVED
to temporary storage (Stash) and can be restored
via Stash panel → right-click → Pop.

Continue?
hard_reset.done_text:
Hard reset complete.

✅ Your uncommitted changes are saved in:
  "{label}"

To restore them:
  Stash panel → right-click → Pop
stash_pop.dialog_text:
Restore changes from stash and delete the entry?

Changes will return to your working copy. The stash entry will be deleted.

To keep the entry — use «Apply» instead of «Pop».
stash_drop.dialog_text:
Delete this stash entry?

⚠ Changes saved in this entry will be permanently lost.

To restore them first — press Cancel and use «Pop».
discard.dialog_text_one:
Discard changes to:
  • {path}

✅ Changes will be SAVED to temporary storage (Stash)
and can be restored via:
  Stash panel → right-click → Pop

Continue?
discard.dialog_text_many:
Discard changes to {n} file(s):
{names}

✅ Changes will be SAVED to temporary storage (Stash)
and can be restored via:
  Stash panel → right-click → Pop

Continue?
discard.success: ✅ Saved to stash "{label}" — restore via Stash → Pop
discard.error_text:
Changes were NOT discarded — your files are safe.

Reason: {error}
